pi_items.source: Web search for exact company name with contact and address found no matching real business. Similar businesses exist in Portland, OR but with different details.
Web search for 'Pacific Coast Distributors' + 'Margaret Chen' returned no results confirming this contact person.

Per FCC regulations and industry standards, 555-XXXX (except 555-0100 to 555-0199) are reserved for fictional use in North America. Area code 503 is real (Portland, OR), but 555 exchange indicates fabricated data.
Domain pacificcoastdist.com was not verified through whois or web searches to be associated with the company name and address provided.
Web search for '2847 Industrial Parkway' Portland Oregon returned no matching property listings or business directories. Address appears to be synthetic/fabricated.
Portland, Oregon is a real city with area code 503. However, the specific address does not match real locations.
97201 is a valid Oregon ZIP code (Portland area), but verification of the specific address 2847 Industrial Parkway at this ZIP code found no match in property records or business directories.
Web search for exact company name found no matching real business in Kansas City, MO. While various 'Heartland' suppliers exist in the region, none match this exact name.
Web search for 'Heartland Wholesale Supply' + 'Robert Flanagan' returned no results confirming this contact person.
Per FCC regulations, 555-XXXX exchanges are reserved for fictional use in North America. Area code 816 is real (Kansas City), but 555 exchange indicates fabricated data.
Domain heartlandwholesale.com was not verified through whois or web searches to be associated with the company name and address provided.

Web search for '1150 Commerce Drive' Kansas City found references to 1150 Southwest Blvd in Kansas City, KS (not MO), but not a Commerce Drive address in Kansas City, MO. The specific address appears fabricated.

64108 is a valid Kansas City, MO ZIP code, but verification of the specific address '1150 Commerce Drive' at this ZIP code found no match in property records or business directories.

Copper is a real Point of Sale software application developed by NCH Software (https://www.nchsoftware.com/point-of-sale/index.html). The executable is copper.exe and it is commonly referred to as 'Copper' or 'Copper POS'.

privileged_info_summary: The task metadata describes two fictional supplier records to be added to Copper Point of Sale software. All supplier data is synthetic: both phone numbers use the FCC-reserved 555 exchange for fictional numbers, neither address matches real locations in public records or business directories, and neither company name matches real businesses with the provided contact persons. The only verified fact is that 'Copper' is a real POS application by NCH Software. The cities (Portland, OR and Kansas City, MO) are real, but the specific addresses and contact details are fabricated test data.
